title: Marketplace Manager - Dishis Designer Jewellery - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Dishis Designer Jewellery - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Marketplace Manager with drive and ambition, Dishis Designer Jewellery in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Dishis Designer Jewellery:
Dishis Designer Jewellery is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dishis Designer Jewellery!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
